title: Using RL Agent to Detect and Remediate ETL Pipeline Failures - Anna Marie Benzon
summary: An RL-guided agent automates ETL pipeline failure recovery by detecting anomalies such as schema drift and data-quality issues, then selecting repair actions like retry or rollback. The system combines deterministic rules, Q-learning, and safety guardrails to achieve minutes-scale recovery.
writeup: This talk presents a reinforcement-learning-guided agent that automates ETL pipeline failure recovery. The agent detects anomalies including schema drift and data-quality issues, then selects repair actions such as retry or rollback. It combines deterministic rules, Q-learning, and safety guardrails, reaching recovery on a minutes-scale timeframe.
